description.from:
Deals 739(1+0.3Skill Level)+355.4% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to enemies in a straight line ahead, stunning them for 1.8 sec. Deals an additional 339(1+0.3Skill Level)+185.4% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to non-hero enemies.
[Experiment Successful!]: No cooldown is incurred.
description.to:
Deals 739*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+355.4% ATK Physical DMG to enemies in a frontal straight-line area and stuns them for 1sec. Non-hero enemies take additional 339*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+185.4% ATK Physical DMG.

[Experiment Success!]: This skill does not trigger a cooldown.

description.from:
Deals 443(1+0.3Skill Level)+213.5% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to the target and nearby enemies, inflicting them with [Explosive Material] for 7 sec, which increases Physical Damage taken by 25% and blinds them for 2.4 sec.
[Experiment Successful!]: Removes beneficial effects from enemies within range.
description.to:
Deals 443*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+213.5% ATK Physical DMG to the target and nearby enemies, inflicting [Explosive Substance] for 7sec, increasing Physical DMG taken by 20% and inflicting Blind for 1sec.

[Experiment Success!]: Removes beneficial effects from enemies within the area.

description.from:
Attaches a sticky bomb to a random enemy.
After 3 sec, the bomb explodes, dealing 1500(1+0.3Skill Level)+755.2% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to the target and nearby enemies and stunning them for 1.8 sec. Enemies with [Explosive Material] take an additional 1001(1+0.3Skill Level)+477.5% of Attack Power as Physical Damage.
[Experiment Successful!]: The bomb explodes immediately upon attaching, triggering its effects.
description.to:
Attaches a sticky bomb to a random enemy.
After 3sec, the bomb explodes, dealing 1500*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+755.2% ATK Physical DMG to the target and nearby enemies, and stunning them for 1sec. Enemies afflicted with [Explosive Substance] take additional 1001*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+477.5% ATK Physical DMG.

[Experiment Success!]: The bomb explodes immediately upon attachment.

description.from:
On Normal Attack, has a 15% chance to fire a shell that deals 345(1+0.3Skill Level)+166.3% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to the target and nearby enemies, stunning them for 1.2 sec.
At the end of each skill, attempts an [Experiment]. There is a 50% chance for success, which empowers the next skill. Empowered skills do not attempt an [Experiment].
description.to:
When performing a Normal Attack, has a 15% chance to fire a shell, dealing 345*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+166.3% ATK Physical DMG to the target and nearby enemies, and stunning them for 1sec.
Each time a skill ends, attempts [Experiment] with a 50% chance to succeed, enhancing the next skill. Enhanced skills do not attempt [Experiment].

dark.from: Increases the duration of Blind by 1.2 sec.
dark.to: Increases the duration of Blind by 1 sec.

light.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, and the number of bomb placements is changed to 2.
light.to: Mana cost increases by 2000, and the number of bomb placements is changed to 2.

light.from: Shell activation chance is increased by 10%, and stun duration is increased by 0.6 sec.
light.to: Shell activation chance increases by 25%, and stun duration increases by 0.5 sec.

dark.from: On [Experiment] success, increases Attack Speed by 300% and Status Ailment Accuracy by 300 for 10 sec.
dark.to: On [Experiment] success, increases Attack Speed by 12% and Status Ailment Accuracy by 150 for 10 sec.

description.from:
[Experiment] success chance is increased by {0}%.
On [Experiment] success, Attack increases by {1}%, Attack Speed by {2}%, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by {3}%. This effect stacks up to 4 times and cannot be dispelled.
description.to:
[Experiment] success chance is increased by {0}%.
On [Experiment] success, Attack increases by {1}%, Attack Speed by {2}%, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by {3}%. This effect stacks up to 3 times and cannot be dispelled.
